title: RSVP
description:
Get the venue ready, keep the guests under control, and do whatever it takes to stop the party from falling apart.

In this first-person party management horror game, you race through the setup phase placing decorations, furniture, and event essentials before the doors open. Once the guests arrive, the real job begins. Clean spills, fix broken speakers, manage food warmers, respond to medical emergencies, and juggle a growing list of disasters as the vibe of the event hangs by a thread.

Every shift is different. Setup tasks and item locations can change from run to run, forcing you to adapt on the fly instead of relying on memory. During the live event, guests wander between activities, line up for food, create messes, and trigger fast-paced problems that demand quick thinking and constant movement. As the night goes on, the pressure rises, the atmosphere worsens, and the party can descend into full chaos.

Stay on top of the setup. Manage the crowd. Fix problems before they spiral. Keep the vibe alive long enough to survive the shift.

Features• First-person party and event management gameplay

• A two-phase loop with timed setup and live event crisis management

• Randomized setup objectives and item spawn locations for replayability

• Multiple active guest issues to handle at once, including spills, speaker failures, food warmer problems, and allergic reactions

• Fast-paced interaction minigames for resolving event problems

• Escalating tension as the event becomes more chaotic and the vibe begins to collapse

• A comedy-horror tone built around panic, multitasking, and disastrous party management
description_short: A first-person party management horror game where you scramble to set up venues, handle chaotic guest incidents, and keep the vibe from collapsing before the night spirals out of control. Will you survive?
